APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT LIVIO SOCAL. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. JUDGE JACKSON MADE A PERSONAL DISCLOSURE THAT SHE KNEW THE TURSI FAMILY AND THAT IT WILL NOT IMPACT HER DECISION ON THE CASE. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 3/19/18 IS CONTINUED TO 9/10/18 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL DISCOVERY AND PRE-TRIAL DEADLINES SHALL TRACK THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Consolidate Actions For Purposes Of Trial Pursuant To Stipulation
Off Calendar Jun-01-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Consolidate Actions For Purposes Of Trial Pursuant To Stipulation is GRANTED. No opposition filed and it appears that all affected parties have stipulated to the relief sought by the motion. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Irene Tofft, CSR # 12313 =302/hk

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Initial Resposnes To Interrogatories, Requests For Production, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. ROBERT G. BURTON, ESQ., Tel No. 415-392-8920 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. JOSEPH W. TURSI, ESQ. of Phillips, Spallas & Angstadt LLP, Tel No. 415-278-9400 appearing telephonically for Defendant Livio Socal.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court modifies its tentative ruling and orders as follows: As to DEFENDANT LIVIO SOCAL'S Motion To Compel Initial Resposnes To Interrogatories, Requests For Production, And For Monetary Sanctions, the motion is granted with modifications discussed at hearing. Sanctions request is withdrawn. Prevailing party to prepare and submit a proposed order for signature. Judge Pro Tem: Vedica Puri, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
